title: Incorrect results for combination of MINUS and VALUES
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IN (0, 1) AND value NOT IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value = 1);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INTEGER, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO another_table (id, description) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of MINUS with VALUES clause
